name: Cranberry Orange Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Combine crust ingredients. Press evenly over bottom of 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 325°F for 5 minutes.
2 cups Cottage cheese
1 package Light cream cheese (8 oz)
2/3 cup Sugar
1/2 cup Plain yogurt
1/4 cup Flour; all-purpose
2 Egg whites
1 Egg
1 tablespoon Orange rind, grated
1 teaspoon Vanilla
In a food processor, blend cottage cheese until smooth. Add cream cheese and process until smooth. Add remaining filling ingredients; process until smooth. Pour into pan.
Bake at 325°F for 50 to 60 minutes or until almost set in center. Run knife around edge of cake to loosen from rim. Cool on rack. Chill.
2 cups Cranberries
1/2 cup Orange juice
1/3 cup Sugar
2 tablespoons Cornstarch
Combine cranberries, orange juice, and sugar in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly. Then simmer 3 minutes or until cranberries start to pop. Dissolve cornstarch in 1 tablespoon water. Add to pan, cook and stir 2 minutes. Chill topping and spread over cake before serving.
